description: Product Description Struggling to find something unique or original to give to that special baby or friend with a baby? Print4u's baby grow onesie range make ideal and unique baby gifts for birthdays, Christmas, Christenings or for the new mum or dad. MACHINE WASHABLE HIGH QUALITY BABY GROW: Our 100% Cotton baby grows are made from a high quality hard wearing, yet super soft cotton that is machine washable - an absolute must for a baby grow. NO CRACKING OR PEELING: Our designs are printed here in the UK using high quality materials so no peeling, cracking or fading whatsoever. Fully machine washable GREAT GIFT CHRISTMAS OR BIRTHDAY PRESENT: Our humorous baby hood designs always raise a smile and make great gift ideas for nephews, nieces, god-children, new borns, new parents and baby's birthdays THREE COLOURS TO SELECT FROM: Our funny baby onesie designs are available in 3 colours - White, Blue and Pink - with many options for personalised baby grow gifts available FOR OPTIMAL CARE PLEASE WASH AND IRON INSIDE OUT A unique gift for that special new born or baby - whether its your son or daughter, niece or nephew or simply as a original birthday present - they will love these personalised, quality cotton baby grow Printed using premium quality inks Two Vibrant colours and easy to read MACHINE WASHABLE HIGH QUALITY BABY ONESIE: Our 100% Cotton baby grows are made from a high quality hard wearing, yet super soft cotton that is machine washable Reinforced and durable stitching No premature ripping and tearing An absolute must have baby onesie. 3 COLOURS TO SELECT FROM: Our funny hoodies are available in Blue, Pink or White with many options for a personalised hoodie gifts No fading even after multiple washes 3 SIZES from 0-3 months to 18 months
